holdings.infoBox: WUGI is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 12.84%, NVIDIA at 8.38%, Micron Technology at 6.78%, Broadcom at 6.30%, and Marvell Technology at 5.77%.

overview.description: The AXS Esoterica NextG Economy ETF (WUGI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of global companies involved in the 5G-enabled digital economy. WUGI was launched on Mar 31, 2020 and is issued by AXS Investments.
